commit_message: Reduce model depth for faster iteration
description: drop depth from 4 to 3 to improve experiments per hour on MPS
hypothesis: smaller depth may reduce wall-clock more than it hurts val_bpb on this machine
next_move: if this loses badly, revert and try a shorter sequence length instead

commit_message: Reduce device batch size for MPS stability
description: lower device batch size from 16 to 8 to improve step consistency on MPS
hypothesis: smaller per-device batches may reduce MPS stalls even if total batch stays fixed
next_move: if throughput regresses, restore the original per-device batch size

replacements.old: DEVICE_BATCH_SIZE = 16  # per-device batch size (reduce if OOM)
replacements.new: DEVICE_BATCH_SIZE = 8   # per-device batch size (reduce if OOM)
